hero.title: AI & ML Playroom
hero.subtitle: Interactive explorations of artificial intelligence and machine learning concepts. Dive deep into the mathematics and intuition behind the algorithms.

rooms.title: Explore Interactive Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Each room is a deep dive into a fundamental concept in AI and machine learning, complete with interactive visualizations and comprehensive mathematical explanations.

gradientDescent.title: Gradient Descent
gradientDescent.description: Explore the fundamental optimization algorithm that powers machine learning. Understand how it finds the minimum of a function step by step.

adamOptimizer.title: Adam Optimizer: GPS of AI Model Building
adamOptimizer.description: From fixed learning rates to adaptive moments — understand how Adam adjusts step sizes per parameter to train neural networks faster and more reliably.

interactiveDemo.title: Gradient Descent Learning Rate Demo
interactiveDemo.subtitle: Visualize how different learning rates affect convergence

controls.title: Controls
controls.learningRateWarning: Learning rate may be too high/low for this function

tooLow.title: Too Low (< 0.05)
tooLow.desc: Convergence is very slow. The algorithm takes many iterations to reach the minimum, but the path is stable.

optimal.title: Optimal (0.05 - 0.3)
optimal.desc: Good balance between speed and stability. Converges efficiently without overshooting the minimum.

tooHigh.title: Too High (> 0.5)
tooHigh.desc: May overshoot the minimum or diverge. The algorithm becomes unstable and might not converge at all.

interactiveAdam.note: All four optimizers start at the same position with the same learning rate α. Watch how adaptive methods (RMSProp, Adam) handle steep gradients automatically — no manual tuning needed.

internals.title: Adam Internal State (x-component)
internals.subtitle: Trace how bias correction shrinks as t grows — the 1/(1−β^t) factor approaches 1 and vanishes
internals.empty: Click Step or Play to see Adam's internal state update in real time.
internals.bias1Early: ← Large early on, shrinks as t grows
